tagline: Choose practical software for a small business stack.

scheduling.label: Scheduling
scheduling.description: Booking tools for calls, appointments, staff calendars, deposits, reminders, and local service workflows.

invoicing.label: Invoicing
invoicing.description: Invoice and billing tools for freelancers, consultants, service businesses, and growing teams.

accounting.label: Accounting
accounting.description: Small-business accounting platforms for invoices, expenses, reconciliation, reporting, and accountant collaboration.

crm.label: CRM
crm.description: Customer relationship tools for lead tracking, follow-up, pipelines, contacts, and email-connected workflows.

email.label: Email Marketing
email.description: Newsletter and automation tools for consent-based campaigns, forms, segmentation, and customer nurture.

forms.label: Forms
forms.description: Form builders for intake, lead capture, surveys, payments, approvals, and simple client workflows.

payments.label: Payments
payments.description: Payment-enabled tools for bookings, invoices, deposits, and lightweight checkout flows.
